19:15:55</sys_updated_on><value>// You can use this step to execute a variety of server-side javascript tests including
// jasmine tests and custom assertions
//
//
// Pass or fail a step: Override the step outcome to pass or fail. This is ignored 
//                      by jasmine tests
//
//  - Return true from the main function body to pass the step
//  - Return false from the main function body to fail the step
//
//
// outputs:       Pre-defined Step config Output variables to set on this step during 
//                execution that are available to later steps
//
// steps(SYS_ID): A function to retrieve Output variable data from a step that executed
//                earlier in the test. The desired step's sys_id is required
//
//  Example:
//
//      // Test step 1 - add data
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      // this sample step's Step config has Output variables named table and record_id
//      outputs.table = 'sc_task';
//      outputs.record_id = gr.insert();
//
//      // Test step 2 - access added data and validate
//      // check that the record exists (or that business logic changed it)
//      var gr = new GlideRecord("sc_task");
//      gr.get(steps(PREVIOUS_STEP_SYS_ID).record_id);
//      assertEqual({name: "task gr exists", shouldbe: true, value: gr.isValidRecord()});
//
//
// stepResult.setOutputMessage: Log a message to step results after step executes.
//                              Can only be called once or will overwrite previous 
//                              message
//
//  Example:
//
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      gr.setValue('short_description', 'verify task can be inserted');
//      var grSysId = gr.insert();
//      var justCreatedGR = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      if (justCreatedGR.get(grSysId)) {
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Successfully inserted task record");
//            return true; // pass the step
//      } else { 
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Failed to insert task record");
//            return false; // fail the step
//      }
//
//
// Note: describe is only supported in Global scope.
// Use 'describe' to create a suite of test scripts and 'it' to define test expectations
//
//  Example jasmine test:
//
//      describe('my suite of script tests', function() {
//            it('should meet expectations', function() {
//                  expect(true).not.toBe(false);
//            });
//      });
//      // make sure to uncomment jasmine.getEnv().execute(); outside the function body
//
//
// assertEqual: A function used to compare that assertion.shouldbe == assertion.value;
//              in case of failure it throws an Error and logs that the assertion by
//              name has failed
//
//  Example:
//
//      var testAssertion = {
//            name: "my test assertion",
//            shouldbe: "expected value"
//            value: "actual value",
//      };
//      assertEqual(testAssertion); // throws Error, logs message to test step output
//
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
var kb= new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
kb.addQuery('short_description','Create Multi Versioned Article 2.0');
kb.query();
kb.next();
var number=kb.getValue('display_number');
	if(number.includes("v2.0")){
		stepResult.setOutputMessage("Article Version is Validated");
		return true;	
	}
	else{
		stepResult.setOutputMessage("Article Version is Invalid");
		return false;
	}
})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
// uncomment the next line to execute this script as a jasmine test
//jasmine.getEnv().execute();

19:16:17</sys_updated_on><value>// You can use this step to execute a variety of server-side javascript tests including
// jasmine tests and custom assertions
//
//
// Pass or fail a step: Override the step outcome to pass or fail. This is ignored 
//                      by jasmine tests
//
//  - Return true from the main function body to pass the step
//  - Return false from the main function body to fail the step
//
//
// outputs:       Pre-defined Step config Output variables to set on this step during 
//                execution that are available to later steps
//
// steps(SYS_ID): A function to retrieve Output variable data from a step that executed
//                earlier in the test. The desired step's sys_id is required
//
//  Example:
//
//      // Test step 1 - add data
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      // this sample step's Step config has Output variables named table and record_id
//      outputs.table = 'sc_task';
//      outputs.record_id = gr.insert();
//
//      // Test step 2 - access added data and validate
//      // check that the record exists (or that business logic changed it)
//      var gr = new GlideRecord("sc_task");
//      gr.get(steps(PREVIOUS_STEP_SYS_ID).record_id);
//      assertEqual({name: "task gr exists", shouldbe: true, value: gr.isValidRecord()});
//
//
// stepResult.setOutputMessage: Log a message to step results after step executes.
//                              Can only be called once or will overwrite previous 
//                              message
//
//  Example:
//
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      gr.setValue('short_description', 'verify task can be inserted');
//      var grSysId = gr.insert();
//      var justCreatedGR = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      if (justCreatedGR.get(grSysId)) {
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Successfully inserted task record");
//            return true; // pass the step
//      } else { 
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Failed to insert task record");
//            return false; // fail the step
//      }
//
//
// Note: describe is only supported in Global scope.
// Use 'describe' to create a suite of test scripts and 'it' to define test expectations
//
//  Example jasmine test:
//
//      describe('my suite of script tests', function() {
//            it('should meet expectations', function() {
//                  expect(true).not.toBe(false);
//            });
//      });
//      // make sure to uncomment jasmine.getEnv().execute(); outside the function body
//
//
// assertEqual: A function used to compare that assertion.shouldbe == assertion.value;
//              in case of failure it throws an Error and logs that the assertion by
//              name has failed
//
//  Example:
//
//      var testAssertion = {
//            name: "my test assertion",
//            shouldbe: "expected value"
//            value: "actual value",
//      };
//      assertEqual(testAssertion); // throws Error, logs message to test step output
//
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
	
var kb = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge_base');
	kb.query();
	kb.initialize();
	kb.setValue('title','Knowledge base - inaccessible to knowledge user');
	kb.setValue('owner','ee826bf03710200044e0bfc8bcbe5de6');
	kb.setValue('workflow','111b7b119f113100d8f8700c267fcfa0');
	kb.setValue('retire_workflow','3bf3fb92c30031000096dfdc64d3ae8c');
	kb.setWorkflow(false);
var kbSysId = kb.insert();
	
var m2m_uc = new GlideRecord('kb_uc_can_contribute_mtom');
	m2m_uc.query();
	m2m_uc.setValue('user_criteria','cb8e06e9d7103100f2d224837e610339');
	m2m_uc.setValue('kb_knowledge_base',kbSysId);
	m2m_uc.insert();
	
var mapping = new GlideRecord('kb_template_m2m_knowledge_base');
mapping.query();

mapping.initialize();
mapping.setValue('kb_knowledge_base','a7e8a78bff0221009b20ffffffffff17');   // Social QA
mapping.setValue('kb_article_template','3c1924540b0103003c328ffe15673a26'); // How to
mapping.insert();

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
// uncomment the next line to execute this script as a jasmine test
//jasmine.getEnv().execute();

articles.insert();
}
	

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);

19:16:04</sys_updated_on><value>// You can use this step to execute a variety of server-side javascript tests including
// jasmine tests and custom assertions
//
//
// Pass or fail a step: Override the step outcome to pass or fail. This is ignored 
//                      by jasmine tests
//
//  - Return true from the main function body to pass the step
//  - Return false from the main function body to fail the step
//
//
// outputs:       Pre-defined Step config Output variables to set on this step during 
//                execution that are available to later steps
//
// steps(SYS_ID): A function to retrieve Output variable data from a step that executed
//                earlier in the test. The desired step's sys_id is required
//
//  Example:
//
//      // Test step 1 - add data
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      // this sample step's Step config has Output variables named table and record_id
//      outputs.table = 'sc_task';
//      outputs.record_id = gr.insert();
//
//      // Test step 2 - access added data and validate
//      // check that the record exists (or that business logic changed it)
//      var gr = new GlideRecord("sc_task");
//      gr.get(steps(PREVIOUS_STEP_SYS_ID).record_id);
//      assertEqual({name: "task gr exists", shouldbe: true, value: gr.isValidRecord()});
//
//
// stepResult.setOutputMessage: Log a message to step results after step executes.
//                              Can only be called once or will overwrite previous 
//                              message
//
//  Example:
//
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      gr.setValue('short_description', 'verify task can be inserted');
//      var grSysId = gr.insert();
//      var justCreatedGR = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      if (justCreatedGR.get(grSysId)) {
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Successfully inserted task record");
//            return true; // pass the step
//      } else { 
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Failed to insert task record");
//            return false; // fail the step
//      }
//
//
// Note: describe is only supported in Global scope.
// Use 'describe' to create a suite of test scripts and 'it' to define test expectations
//
//  Example jasmine test:
//
//      describe('my suite of script tests', function() {
//            it('should meet expectations', function() {
//                  expect(true).not.toBe(false);
//            });
//      });
//      // make sure to uncomment jasmine.getEnv().execute(); outside the function body
//
//
// assertEqual: A function used to compare that assertion.shouldbe == assertion.value;
//              in case of failure it throws an Error and logs that the assertion by
//              name has failed
//
//  Example:
//
//      var testAssertion = {
//            name: "my test assertion",
//            shouldbe: "expected value"
//            value: "actual value",
//      };
//      assertEqual(testAssertion); // throws Error, logs message to test step output
//
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
	
	var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_properties');
	gr.addQuery('sys_id','d20ff8ab53012300cc376512a2dc3483');  // enable ownership groups
	gr.query();

	if (gr.next()){
		gr.setValue('value','true');
		gr.update();
	}
	
	var gr2 = new GlideRecord('sys_properties');
	gr2.addQuery('sys_id','a7cc6dfa53730300cc376512a2dc34ac');
	gr2.query();
	
	if (gr2.next()){
		gr2.setValue('value','true');
		gr2.update();
	}
	
	var gr3 = new GlideRecord('sys_user_has_role');
	gr3.query();

	gr3.initialize();
	gr3.setValue('user','62826bf03710200044e0bfc8bcbe5df1'); // abel tuter user
	gr3.setValue('role','aaa4855d0a0a0b820170399909974b83'); // knowledge_admin role
	gr3.insert();

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
// uncomment the next line to execute this script as a jasmine test
//jasmine.getEnv().execute();
</value><variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable></sys_variable_value></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_atf_test_suite_d60a0672474b7650b64588ff336d432f
sys_update_xml.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_atf_test_suite"><sys_atf_test_suite action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><description>This is a copy of the sample test suite to test Knowledge Management application – so we can modify it to pass on USPS's customized KM.
The test suite covers below use cases:
- Create a KCS article from Case
- Create KCS Template Article with Approval Publish workflow
- Create MultiVersioned standard Article with approval publish workflow
- User criteria covering canRead and canContribute for KnowledgeBase and canRead at Article level
- Article level subscription
- Requestor performs search, view the article and provide feedback (Helpful No with Feedback Task)
- Create a checklist, assign to KB and perform AQI.
- Create and edit an article from Feedback Task form.
- Knowledge base level subscriptions
- Search for pinned articles and check if the click rank is captured correctly
- Create an Ownership Group and check edit permissions and subscriptions
- Create, search and view knowledge articles with knowledge blocks
- Validate that a versioned article is created, published, checked out, and retired
- Verify the scheduled publish feature for knowledge articles
- Validate the Knowledge - Approval Publish workflow in Agent Workspace</description><input_filter/><name>KM: Knowledge Management copy</name><parent/><sn_atf_tg_generated>false</sn_atf_tg_generated><sys_class_name>sys_atf_test_suite</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>BN8JF0</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-17 19:15:53</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_id>d60a0672474b7650b64588ff336d432f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>KM: Knowledge Management copy</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_atf_test_suite_d60a0672474b7650b64588ff336d432f</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>BN8JF0</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-27 18:21:35</sys_updated_on></sys_atf_test_suite></record_update>

19:16:19</sys_updated_on><value>
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
var gr = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
gr.addQuery('short_description','CONTAINS','ATF: Article');
gr.addQuery('workflow_state','draft');
gr.query();

while(gr.next()){
  gr.workflow_state = 'published';
  gr.update();
}


})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
</value><variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable></sys_variable_value></record_update>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_atf_step"><sys_atf_step action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><active>true</active><callable_outputs/><copied_from display_value="Run Server Side Script">cc00b5cfdb3073004508743dbf9619ba</copied_from><description>Run Server Side Validation Script</description><display_name>Run Server Side Script</display_name><inputs/><mugshots_cache_json/><notes>Enable Ownership group property set to 'true'
Enable feedback task for article marked 'Not Helpful'</notes><order>2</order><step_config display_value="Run Server Side Script">41de4a935332120028bc29cac2dc349a</step_config><sys_class_name>sys_atf_step</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>BN8JF0</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-17 19:16:08</sys_created_on><sys_customer_update>false</sys_customer_update><sys_id>3d1ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4381</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_name>Run Server Side Script</sys_name><sys_package display_value="Global" source="global">global</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_replace_on_upgrade>false</sys_replace_on_upgrade><sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope><sys_update_name>sys_atf_step_3d1ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4381</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>BN8JF0</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 19:16:08</sys_updated_on><table/><test display_value="KM: Create an Ownership Group and check edit permissions and subscriptions copy">b11ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4364</test><timeout>1970-01-01 00:00:00</timeout><warning_message/></sys_atf_step><sys_variable_value action="delete_multiple" query="document_key=3d1ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4381"/><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_atf_step</document><document_key>3d1ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4381</document_key><order>200</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>BN8JF0</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-17 19:16:08</sys_created_on><sys_id>311ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4383</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>BN8JF0</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 19:16:08</sys_updated_on><value>// You can use this step to execute a variety of server-side javascript tests including
// jasmine tests and custom assertions
//
//
// Pass or fail a step: Override the step outcome to pass or fail. This is ignored 
//                      by jasmine tests
//
//  - Return true from the main function body to pass the step
//  - Return false from the main function body to fail the step
//
//
// outputs:       Pre-defined Step config Output variables to set on this step during 
//                execution that are available to later steps
//
// steps(SYS_ID): A function to retrieve Output variable data from a step that executed
//                earlier in the test. The desired step's sys_id is required
//
//  Example:
//
//      // Test step 1 - add data
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      // this sample step's Step config has Output variables named table and record_id
//      outputs.table = 'sc_task';
//      outputs.record_id = gr.insert();
//
//      // Test step 2 - access added data and validate
//      // check that the record exists (or that business logic changed it)
//      var gr = new GlideRecord("sc_task");
//      gr.get(steps(PREVIOUS_STEP_SYS_ID).record_id);
//      assertEqual({name: "task gr exists", shouldbe: true, value: gr.isValidRecord()});
//
//
// stepResult.setOutputMessage: Log a message to step results after step executes.
//                              Can only be called once or will overwrite previous 
//                              message
//
//  Example:
//
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      gr.setValue('short_description', 'verify task can be inserted');
//      var grSysId = gr.insert();
//      var justCreatedGR = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      if (justCreatedGR.get(grSysId)) {
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Successfully inserted task record");
//            return true; // pass the step
//      } else { 
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Failed to insert task record");
//            return false; // fail the step
//      }
//
//
// Note: describe is only supported in Global scope.
// Use 'describe' to create a suite of test scripts and 'it' to define test expectations
//
//  Example jasmine test:
//
//      describe('my suite of script tests', function() {
//            it('should meet expectations', function() {
//                  expect(true).not.toBe(false);
//            });
//      });
//      // make sure to uncomment jasmine.getEnv().execute(); outside the function body
//
//
// assertEqual: A function used to compare that assertion.shouldbe == assertion.value;
//              in case of failure it throws an Error and logs that the assertion by
//              name has failed
//
//  Example:
//
//      var testAssertion = {
//            name: "my test assertion",
//            shouldbe: "expected value"
//            value: "actual value",
//      };
//      assertEqual(testAssertion); // throws Error, logs message to test step output
//
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
	
	var gr = new GlideRecord('sys_properties');
	gr.addQuery('sys_id','d20ff8ab53012300cc376512a2dc3483');  // enable ownership groups
	gr.query();

	if (gr.next()){
		gr.setValue('value','true');
		gr.update();
	}
	
	var gr2 = new GlideRecord('sys_properties');
	gr2.addQuery('sys_id','a7cc6dfa53730300cc376512a2dc34ac');
	gr2.query();
	
	if (gr2.next()){
		gr2.setValue('value','true');
		gr2.update();
	}

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
// uncomment the next line to execute this script as a jasmine test
//jasmine.getEnv().execute();
</value><variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable></sys_variable_value><sys_variable_value action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><document>sys_atf_step</document><document_key>3d1ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4381</document_key><order>100</order><sys_class_name>sys_variable_value</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>BN8JF0</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-02-17 19:16:08</sys_created_on><sys_id>f91ace72474b7650b64588ff336d4382</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>BN8JF0</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 19:16:08</sys_updated_on><value>3.1</value><variable display_value="Jasmine version">42f2564b73031300440211d8faf6a777</variable></sys_variable_value></record_update>

19:16:06</sys_updated_on><value>(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
var article1 = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
article1.addQuery('short_description','CONTAINS','ATF: Article');
article1.query();
article1.next();

var article2 = new GlideRecord('sc_cat_item');
article2.addQuery('name','CONTAINS','Apple iPhone 6s');
article2.query();
if (article2.next()) {
    article2.active = true; // or article2.setValue('active', true);
    article2.update();
}

var related_articles_mapping = new GlideRecord('kb_2_sc');
related_articles_mapping.query();

related_articles_mapping.initialize();
related_articles_mapping.setValue('kb_knowledge',article1.getUniqueValue());
related_articles_mapping.setValue('sc_cat_item',article2.getUniqueValue());
related_articles_mapping.insert();

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
// uncomment the next line to execute this script as a jasmine test
//jasmine.getEnv().execute();
</value><variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable></sys_variable_value></record_update>

19:15:59</sys_updated_on><value>// You can use this step to execute a variety of server-side javascript tests including
// jasmine tests and custom assertions
//
//
// Pass or fail a step: Override the step outcome to pass or fail. This is ignored 
//                      by jasmine tests
//
//  - Return true from the main function body to pass the step
//  - Return false from the main function body to fail the step
//
//
// outputs:       Pre-defined Step config Output variables to set on this step during 
//                execution that are available to later steps
//
// steps(SYS_ID): A function to retrieve Output variable data from a step that executed
//                earlier in the test. The desired step's sys_id is required
//
//  Example:
//
//      // Test step 1 - add data
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      // this sample step's Step config has Output variables named table and record_id
//      outputs.table = 'sc_task';
//      outputs.record_id = gr.insert();
//
//      // Test step 2 - access added data and validate
//      // check that the record exists (or that business logic changed it)
//      var gr = new GlideRecord("sc_task");
//      gr.get(steps(PREVIOUS_STEP_SYS_ID).record_id);
//      assertEqual({name: "task gr exists", shouldbe: true, value: gr.isValidRecord()});
//
//
// stepResult.setOutputMessage: Log a message to step results after step executes.
//                              Can only be called once or will overwrite previous 
//                              message
//
//  Example:
//
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      gr.setValue('short_description', 'verify task can be inserted');
//      var grSysId = gr.insert();
//      var justCreatedGR = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      if (justCreatedGR.get(grSysId)) {
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Successfully inserted task record");
//            return true; // pass the step
//      } else { 
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Failed to insert task record");
//            return false; // fail the step
//      }
//
//
// Note: describe is only supported in Global scope.
// Use 'describe' to create a suite of test scripts and 'it' to define test expectations
//
//  Example jasmine test:
//
//      describe('my suite of script tests', function() {
//            it('should meet expectations', function() {
//                  expect(true).not.toBe(false);
//            });
//      });
//      // make sure to uncomment jasmine.getEnv().execute(); outside the function body
//
//
// assertEqual: A function used to compare that assertion.shouldbe == assertion.value;
//              in case of failure it throws an Error and logs that the assertion by
//              name has failed
//
//  Example:
//
//      var testAssertion = {
//            name: "my test assertion",
//            shouldbe: "expected value"
//            value: "actual value",
//      };
//      assertEqual(testAssertion); // throws Error, logs message to test step output
//
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
	
	var gdt = new GlideDateTime();
	gdt.add(60*1000);

	var gr = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
	gr.addQuery('short_description','KM: ATF to test scheduled publish feature');
	gr.query();

	if (gr.next())
	{
		gr.setValue('scheduled_publish_date',gdt.getNumericValue());
		gr.update();
	}

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
// uncomment the next line to execute this script as a jasmine test
//jasmine.getEnv().execute();

(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
	
	var user_roles = new GlideRecord("sys_user_has_role");

user_roles.initialize();
user_roles.setValue("user","62826bf03710200044e0bfc8bcbe5df1");     // abel tuter
user_roles.setValue("role","1f26da36c0a8016b000c7f06a1ce7e14");     // knowledge role

user_roles.initialize();
user_roles.setValue("user","a8f98bb0eb32010045e1a5115206fe3a");     // abraham lincoln

user_roles.initialize();
user_roles.setValue("user","0a826bf03710200044e0bfc8bcbe5d7a");     // adela cervantsz
user_roles.setValue("role","1f26da36c0a8016b000c7f06a1ce7e14");     // knowledge role

19:16:20</sys_updated_on><value>
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
var article1 = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
article1.addQuery('short_description','CONTAINS','ATF: Article 1');
article1.query();
article1.next();

var article2 = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
article2.addQuery('short_description','CONTAINS','ATF: Article 2');
article2.query();
article2.next();

var related_articles_mapping = new GlideRecord('kb_2_kb');
related_articles_mapping.query();

related_articles_mapping.initialize();
related_articles_mapping.setValue('kb_knowledge',article1.getUniqueValue());
related_articles_mapping.setValue('related_kb_knowledge',article2.getUniqueValue());
related_articles_mapping.insert();

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
</value><variable display_value="Test script">989d9e235324220002c6435723dc3484</variable></sys_variable_value></record_update>

19:16:06</sys_updated_on><value>(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
var gr = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
gr.addQuery('short_description','CONTAINS','ATF: Article');
gr.addQuery('workflow_state','draft');
gr.query();

while(gr.next()){
  gr.workflow_state = 'published';
  gr.update();
}


})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);

19:15:57</sys_created_on><sys_id>530ac672474b7650b64588ff336d431f</sys_id><sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count><sys_updated_by>BN8JF0</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-02-17 19:15:57</sys_updated_on><value>// You can use this step to execute a variety of server-side javascript tests including
// jasmine tests and custom assertions
//
//
// Pass or fail a step: Override the step outcome to pass or fail. This is ignored 
//                      by jasmine tests
//
//  - Return true from the main function body to pass the step
//  - Return false from the main function body to fail the step
//
//
// outputs:       Pre-defined Step config Output variables to set on this step during 
//                execution that are available to later steps
//
// steps(SYS_ID): A function to retrieve Output variable data from a step that executed
//                earlier in the test. The desired step's sys_id is required
//
//  Example:
//
//      // Test step 1 - add data
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      // this sample step's Step config has Output variables named table and record_id
//      outputs.table = 'sc_task';
//      outputs.record_id = gr.insert();
//
//      // Test step 2 - access added data and validate
//      // check that the record exists (or that business logic changed it)
//      var gr = new GlideRecord("sc_task");
//      gr.get(steps(PREVIOUS_STEP_SYS_ID).record_id);
//      assertEqual({name: "task gr exists", shouldbe: true, value: gr.isValidRecord()});
//
//
// stepResult.setOutputMessage: Log a message to step results after step executes.
//                              Can only be called once or will overwrite previous 
//                              message
//
//  Example:
//
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      gr.setValue('short_description', 'verify task can be inserted');
//      var grSysId = gr.insert();
//      var justCreatedGR = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      if (justCreatedGR.get(grSysId)) {
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Successfully inserted task record");
//            return true; // pass the step
//      } else { 
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Failed to insert task record");
//            return false; // fail the step
//      }
//
//
// Note: describe is only supported in Global scope.
// Use 'describe' to create a suite of test scripts and 'it' to define test expectations
//
//  Example jasmine test:
//
//      describe('my suite of script tests', function() {
//            it('should meet expectations', function() {
//                  expect(true).not.toBe(false);
//            });
//      });
//      // make sure to uncomment jasmine.getEnv().execute(); outside the function body
//
//
// assertEqual: A function used to compare that assertion.shouldbe == assertion.value;
//              in case of failure it throws an Error and logs that the assertion by
//              name has failed
//
//  Example:
//
//      var testAssertion = {
//            name: "my test assertion",
//            shouldbe: "expected value"
//            value: "actual value",
//      };
//      assertEqual(testAssertion); // throws Error, logs message to test step output
//
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {

// Adding "Admin" role CanContribute User Criteria to Knowledge Base
var canContributeUC = new GlideRecord('kb_uc_can_contribute_mtom');
canContributeUC.initialize();
canContributeUC.setValue('kb_knowledge_base','5c45a3a0d712120023c84f80de61038b');
canContributeUC.setValue('user_criteria', 'cb8e06e9d7103100f2d224837e610339');
canContributeUC.insert();

// Adding "knowledge" role CanRead User Criteria to Knowledge Base
var canReadUC = new GlideRecord('kb_uc_can_read_mtom');
canReadUC.initialize();
canReadUC.setValue('kb_knowledge_base', '5c45a3a0d712120023c84f80de61038b');
canReadUC.setValue('user_criteria', 'ebb789d3ff4131003f07ffffffffff3f');
canReadUC.insert();
	
var sysUserHasRole = new GlideRecord('sys_user_has_role');
	sysUserHasRole.initialize();
	sysUserHasRole.setValue('user', '62826bf03710200044e0bfc8bcbe5df1');
	sysUserHasRole.setValue('role', '1f26da36c0a8016b000c7f06a1ce7e14');
	sysUserHasRole.insert();

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
// uncomment the next line to execute this script as a jasmine test
//jasmine.getEnv().execute();

(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
var article=new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
if(article.get('short_description','Article Created by Admin')) {
article.setValue('can_read_user_criteria','cb8e06e9d7103100f2d224837e610339');
article.update();
}

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);

//

// steps(SYS_ID): A function to retrieve Output variable data from a step that executed
//                earlier in the test. The desired step's sys_id is required
//
//  Example:

//      // Test step 1 - add data
//      var gr = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      // this sample step's Step config has Output variables named table and record_id
//      outputs.table = 'sc_task';
//      outputs.record_id = gr.insert();
//
//      // Test step 2 - access added data and validate

//      var gr = new GlideRecord("sc_task");
//      gr.get(steps(PREVIOUS_STEP_SYS_ID).record_id);
//      assertEqual({name: "task gr exists", shouldbe: true, value: gr.isValidRecord()});
//
//
// stepResult.setOutputMessage: Log a message to step results after step executes.

//      var justCreatedGR = new GlideRecord('sc_task');
//      if (justCreatedGR.get(grSysId)) {
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Successfully inserted task record");
//            return true; // pass the step
//      } else { 
//            stepResult.setOutputMessage("Failed to insert task record");
//            return false; // fail the step
//      }
//
//
// Note: describe is only supported in Global scope.
// Use 'describe' to create a suite of test scripts and 'it' to define test expectations

//
//
// assertEqual: A function used to compare that assertion.shouldbe == assertion.value;

//
//  Example:
//
//      var testAssertion = {

//            shouldbe: "expected value"
//            value: "actual value",
//      };
//      assertEqual(testAssertion); // throws Error, logs message to test step output
//
(function(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual) {
    // add test script here
	
var article = new GlideRecord('kb_knowledge');
article.query();

article.initialize();
article.setValue('short_description','ATF - validating approval retire workflow');
article.setValue('kb_knowledge_base','a7e8a78bff0221009b20ffffffffff17');
article.insert();

})(outputs, steps, stepResult, assertEqual);
